name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
Celin* 2022 Autumn New Triomphe Saddle Bag Calfskin
Small size, big capacity
Features classic gold Triomphe hardware, exquisite and versatile
Unlike the usual square shape, the curved bottom adds a touch of softness
Dimensions: 19*16*8cm
